title: Smoked Spanish Frittata
description: A savory and rich frittata packed with the flavors of Spain, featuring smoked ingredients and a creamy twist.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and smoked paprika.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
6. Add diced bake and cook until lightly browned, about 4-5 minutes.
7. Pour in whisked eggs and cook until edges start to set.
8. Transfer skillet to preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
9. Remove skillet from oven and sprinkle shredded manchego cheese and heavy cream over the top.
10. Return skillet to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
11. Remove skillet from oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
